summary: UX Fixes Testing - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED WORKING. Tested supplier prices £, score tooltips, plain English descriptions, 'Search on' buttons, trend alerts consistency, API recommendations, and product images.

issues: Console shows Mixed Content warnings for notifications endpoint (http vs https) - does not affect functionality

BACKEND: test_validation_has_strengths_array - Has populated strengths
BACKEND: test_validation_no_missing_data_weakness - No 'Missing data:' in weaknesses
BACKEND: test_confidence_above_minimum - Confidence >= 25%
BACKEND: test_success_probability_positive - Success probability > 0
BACKEND: test_supplier_returns_data - Returns suppliers with numeric prices
BACKEND: test_alerts_endpoint_exists - Alerts endpoint accessible
BACKEND: test_health_endpoint - Backend healthy

FRONTEND: Supplier buttons say 'Search on AliExpress' and 'Search on CJ' - NOT 'View on...'
FRONTEND: No 'View Supplier' button in product header (removed as expected)
FRONTEND: Score cards have Info tooltip icons (ℹ️) for explanations
FRONTEND: Score breakdown shows plain English descriptions (e.g., 'Is this product getting more popular?')
FRONTEND: Product detail shows 'Promising - Monitor Closely' badge (NOT 'Insufficient Data')
FRONTEND: Launch Score Breakdown shows all 5 scores (TREND, MARGIN, COMPETITION, AD ACTIVITY, SUPPLIER)
FRONTEND: Trend Alerts page shows consistent severity labels (Rising Trend, Trending Fast, Early Stage)
FRONTEND: Trend Alerts show Launch Score values
FRONTEND: No 'EXPLODING' alert type visible (updated to consistent labels)
FRONTEND: Bike pump product shows pump/inflator image - NOT a car
FRONTEND: Kids tablet product shows tablet device image - NOT chalk sticks

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 10 UX fixes verified via screenshots and manual testing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX fixes from user feedback are verified working: (1) Supplier prices now show £ not $, (2) Score cards have tooltip icons with explanations, (3) Score breakdown has plain English descriptions, (4) No 'View Supplier' button in header, (5) Supplier buttons say 'Search on...', (6) Trend alerts show consistent labels, (7) API returns real recommendations not 'insufficient_data', (8) Product images are correct (bike pump shows pump, kids tablet shows tablet). The Mixed Content warning for notifications endpoint is a minor issue that doesn't affect functionality.
